title: Incorrect LIMIT on a UNION ALL query
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, value REAL);
INSERT INTO t2(name, value) VALUES('item2', NULL);
SELECT * FROM (SELECT id, name FROM t2) UNION ALL SELECT * FROM (SELECT id, value FROM t2 ORDER BY value) LIMIT 1 OFFSET 3;
key_bug_features: LIMIT disabled when OFFSET exceeds first SELECT row count
